summary: Made two surgical seam edits: recast the opening around Nura's interior sorting so it doesn't mirror the adjacent dawn dismantling openings, and revised the final sentence to lead into Chapter 18 without duplicating its trunk-lift beat.
edits: Rewrote the opening paragraph to anchor the chapter in Nura's floor-sorting before the roof removal begins.
Trimmed the now-redundant follow-up description of Nura's practical sorting posture.
Adjusted the closing line so the dawn departure is foreshadowed without repeating Chapter 18's first action verbatim.
